info.title: YuvexPay API
info.description: The YuvexPay API allows you to accept payments, process withdrawals, manage products and customers programmatically. All API access is over HTTPS and uses JSON request/response bodies.

servers.description: Same base URL serves both sandbox and production. Send a `ypk_test_*` key for sandbox or a `ypk_live_*` key for production.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Inspect the API key in use

get.description: Return metadata about the API key currently being used: id, name, environment, scopes, IP allowlist, last-used timestamp and expiration. Useful for verifying key configuration without storing it client-side.

post.description: Create a new payment. Supports PIX, direct credit card charges for headless single-method CARD flows, hosted card checkout, and boleto. Requires an idempotency key.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of payments with optional filters.
Retrieve a single payment by its ID.
Retrieve a payment using the YuvexPay transaction ID (`txId`) instead of the UUID.
Download the boleto PDF for a payment whose method is BOLETO. The response is the PDF binary; clients should treat the body as `application/pdf`.

post.description: Issue a full or partial refund for a paid payment. Requires an idempotency key.

get.description: Retrieve all refunds for a specific payment.

post.description: Create a PIX withdrawal to transfer BRL funds from your YuvexPay balance. Requires an idempotency key. Withdrawals may be blocked outside business hours or if your account has restrictions.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of withdrawals with optional filters.

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: Filter by withdrawal method. Public withdrawals currently support PIX only.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Filter by currency. Public withdrawals currently support BRL only.

get.description: Retrieve your current daily withdrawal limits, usage, and fee information. Limits are reduced during nighttime hours (22:00-06:00 BRT).
Retrieve a single withdrawal by its ID.

post.description: Create a new product in your catalog. Products can be referenced when creating payments to pre-fill amount and description.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of products with optional search and filters.
Retrieve a single product by its ID.

patch.description: Update one or more fields of an existing product.

delete.description: Soft-delete a product by setting it as inactive. The product data is preserved but it can no longer be used in new payments.

post.description: Upload (or replace) the image for a product. Send a single file as `multipart/form-data`. Accepted formats: PNG, JPEG. Maximum 10 MB.

file.description: Image file (PNG or JPEG, max 10 MB).

delete.description: Remove the image associated with a product.

get.description: Retrieve a product using your own external ID instead of the YuvexPay UUID.

post.description: Create a new customer record. Customers can be associated with payments for tracking and recurring billing.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of customers with optional search and filters.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, email, or document.

get.description: Retrieve a single customer by their ID, including metadata.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The customer's prefixed identifier (e.g., `cus_ab12cd34ef`). This is the merchant-facing slug, not the internal UUID.

patch.description: Update one or more fields of an existing customer.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The customer's prefixed identifier (e.g., `cus_ab12cd34ef`). This is the merchant-facing slug, not the internal UUID.

delete.description: Soft-delete a customer by setting them as inactive. Customer data is preserved.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The customer's prefixed identifier (e.g., `cus_ab12cd34ef`). This is the merchant-facing slug, not the internal UUID.

get.description: Generate a receipt document for a specific payment. Available in HTML or plain text format.

content.description: The receipt content in the requested format.

get.description: Generate a receipt document for a specific withdrawal. Available in HTML or plain text format.

content.description: The receipt content in the requested format.

get.description: Generate an account statement for a date range. Maximum range is 90 days.

content.description: The statement content in the requested format.

post.description: Card or boleto payment was authorized by the issuer. Funds are held as receivable but not yet settled.

200.description: Return a 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Funds were received and the net amount was credited to your balance.

200.description: Return a 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Triggered when a payment expires before being completed.

200.description: Return a 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: A refund completed for this payment.

200.description: Return a 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: A refund attempt could not be executed. The funds are returned to your balance and you may retry.

200.description: Return a 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: A chargeback was opened or processed against this payment.

200.description: Return a 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: A PIX MED (special refund mechanism) request was opened by the payer's bank. Funds for the affected payment are temporarily held.

200.description: Return a 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: A PIX MED request was resolved (approved or rejected).

200.description: Return a 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: A withdrawal was created and is being processed.

200.description: Return a 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Triggered when a withdrawal is successfully processed.

200.description: Return a 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

post.description: Triggered when a withdrawal fails to process.

200.description: Return a 2xx status to acknowledge receipt.

bearerAuth.description: YuvexPay API key. Include as `Authorization: Bearer ypk_<env>_<kid>_<secret>` where `<env>` is `test` (sandbox) or `live` (production). Create and manage keys in the dashboard under **Settings > API Keys**.

IdempotencyKey.name: X-Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: A unique string to ensure the request is processed only once. Must be unique per request. Valid for 24 hours.

productId.description: Link this payment to an existing product. If set, `amount` is optional and defaults to the product price.

customerId.description: Link this payment to an existing customer. For CARD and BOLETO, the linked customer must have name and CPF/CNPJ.

amount.description: Payment amount. Required unless `productId` is provided.

methods.description: Accepted payment methods. Headless payments must use exactly one method.

mode.description: hosted redirects the payer to a YuvexPay checkout page. headless returns method data directly for a single payment method. Headless CARD requires the card payload for direct credit card capture. Hosted or multi-method CARD flows continue through checkout/provider invoice URLs, where debit remains available.

returnUrl.description: URL to redirect the payer after payment (hosted mode).

completionUrl.description: URL to redirect the payer after successful payment completion.

description.description: Payment description shown to the payer.

externalId.description: Your own reference ID (e.g., order number).

customer.description: Inline customer data. For CARD and BOLETO, include at least name and CPF/CNPJ unless you use customerId.

name.description: Payer name. Required for CARD and BOLETO when not using customerId.

document.description: CPF or CNPJ. Required for CARD and BOLETO when not using customerId.

phone.description: Payer phone number in national or international format.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs attached to the payment.

card.description: Direct credit card charge payload. Allowed only for headless single-method CARD payments and required in that flow.

installments.description: Installment count for direct credit card charges.

remoteIp.description: Customer IP address required by the acquiring flow.

holderInfo.description: Supplemental cardholder billing data. `postalCode` and `addressNumber` are required.

document.description: CPF or CNPJ for the cardholder.

amount.description: Refund amount. Omit for a full refund.

method.description: Public withdrawals currently support PIX only.

pixKey.description: PIX key (CPF, CNPJ, email, phone, or random key).

recipientDocument.description: Recipient CPF or CNPJ for validation.

amount.description: Set to `null` to remove the default price.

methodData.description: Payment method-specific data (QR code for PIX, barcode for boleto, etc.).

pixKey.description: The destination PIX key, masked. The full key is never returned by the API once the withdrawal is created.

pixKeyType.description: Type of PIX key (CPF, CNPJ, EMAIL, PHONE, RANDOM).

errorMessage.description: Human-readable failure message. Treat as opaque text and surface only to internal operators.

isNightTime.description: Whether reduced night limits are active.

customerId.description: Merchant-facing customer slug (e.g., `cus_ab12cd34ef`). Use this as the `{customerId}` path parameter in subsequent calls.

data.description: Event payload containing the resource data.

name.description: Human-readable name set in the dashboard.

environment.description: Environment the key is bound to.

prefix.description: The non-secret prefix of the key (`ypk_<env>_<kid>`). Safe to log.

ipAllowlist.description: List of allowed IPs/CIDRs. Empty means no restriction.

rateLimitPerMinute.description: Per-key rate limit in requests per minute, or null for the account default.

expiresAt.description: Expiration timestamp, or null if the key does not expire.

methodData.description: Method-specific data. PIX returns QR data. Direct CARD returns captureType: DIRECT plus masked credit card data. Invoice-style CARD/BOLETO returns provider invoice links.

IdempotencyConflict.description: Idempotency conflict. The key was already used with a different payload.

error.message: Idempotency key already used with a different request body
